name: the write-time hook blocks an ADR write proposing a forbidden design via prose-as-code
command:
printf '# 0001. Net

## Decision

Leave ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0).
' > 0001-net.md && printf '{"tool_input":{"file_path":"%s/0001-net.md"}}' "$PWD" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-on-save.sh"
